Failure_Mode: No system heartbeat — silent system death goes undetected
Effect: System appears fine but has silently stopped monitoring (app crashed; Mosquitto stopped; all zones coincidentally quiet) — operator has no indication
Cause: No health-check / heartbeat mechanism; operator only learns of problem when a zone alert fires — but if the alert system is also broken this never happens
Current_Controls: Alert log in dashboard provides manual check; no automated heartbeat
Recommended_Action: Implement daily "system alive" heartbeat email; add /health HTTP endpoint monitored by external uptime service (e.g. UptimeRobot); alert on heartbeat absence

Failure_Mode: Capacitive soil moisture sensor reads constant high value (stuck wet)
Effect: Auto-watering never triggers; plants starve of water; no alert because sensor_ok reports true (sensor is responding but drifting)
Cause: Sensor corrosion; waterlogging of electronics; capacitance drift from salt buildup in substrate
Current_Controls: No plausibility checking on sensor readings — sensor_ok only flags hard failure; dripper learning indirectly detects if watering never fires
Recommended_Action: Add bounds/plausibility check: alert if moisture reading unchanged for >6 hours while not watering; cross-check moisture trend vs watering history

Failure_Mode: Data lost during comms outage (no local storage at site)
Effect: All sensor readings during 4G outage are lost; gaps in moisture/VPD history; watering events unrecorded; no forensic data if plants are damaged
Cause: No local data buffering on-site; all data must flow through 4G to central server in real time
Current_Controls: No existing control for this gap
Recommended_Action: Add Nerves Pi at site with local SQLite; buffer all readings locally; sync to central server when comms restored

Failure_Mode: Alerts fire during comms outage (4G down) — never delivered
Effect: Valve stuck open or critical dry condition at site is undetectable while 4G is down; local ESP32 attempts mitigation but operator has no awareness
Cause: 4G WAN down; Twilio/SMTP require internet; no local alerting mechanism
Current_Controls: ESP32 local fallback continues autonomous watering; NC solenoids safe on power loss; ZoneServer alerts are queued in memory (not retried after comms restore)
Recommended_Action: Add Nerves Pi at site with local alerting via GSM modem or pre-configured local email relay; retry undelivered alerts on comms restore

Failure_Mode: Moisture reading drifts gradually (slow calibration drift)
Effect: Watering triggers at wrong thresholds; plants gradually over- or under-watered; no alert because sensor appears functional
Cause: Long-term substrate salt accumulation shifting capacitance baseline; temperature effect on capacitance
Current_Controls: No drift/plausibility detection; sensor_ok only catches hard failures
Recommended_Action: Implement rolling baseline comparison; alert if moisture value drifts >20% over 7 days with no watering events to explain it; schedule periodic sensor recalibration

Failure_Mode: Solenoid valve stuck mechanically open (valve passes water when de-energised)
Effect: Continuous uncontrolled irrigation; root rot; water wastage; potential flooding of beds; dripper_fault flag may fire but only after several baseline events
Cause: Debris in valve seat; worn diaphragm; calcium scaling; old valve
Current_Controls: Dripper learning detects no moisture rise after watering (fault if expected rise missing after 3 baselines) — but stuck-open causes constant wetness not a stuck-closed symptom; ZoneServer watchdog sends stop command but relay-off does not help if valve mechanically failed
Recommended_Action: Install flow sensors or water meter per zone; inspect/replace valves on maintenance schedule; add moisture ceiling alert (moisture >90% for extended period)

Failure_Mode: Email delivery fails silently (SMTP error not surfaced to operator)
Effect: Critical alerts (valve stuck open; critical dry) not received; operator unaware of emergency
Cause: SMTP server unreachable; credentials expired; spam filter blocking; email.enabled = false accidentally
Current_Controls: Alert always written to alert_logs table in SQLite regardless of email delivery; Elixir Logger records SMTP error; dashboard logs page shows all alerts
Recommended_Action: Add alert delivery confirmation: if SMTP send fails log as delivery_failure in alert_logs; add periodic health-check email (daily "system alive"); surface delivery failures on dashboard

Failure_Mode: SMS delivery fails silently (Twilio API error)
Effect: Critical SMS alert not received; operator unaware of flooding or extreme dryness during off-hours
Cause: Twilio account credit exhausted; API credentials revoked; no internet from central server
Current_Controls: Alert always written to alert_logs table; Logger records HTTP error; Twilio returns status code checked in code
Recommended_Action: Add delivery confirmation flag in alert_logs; alert operator via email if SMS fails; monitor Twilio account balance; add test SMS on schedule

Failure_Mode: DHT22 reads plausible but wrong values (drift/offset)
Effect: VPD calculated incorrectly; watering decisions skewed; no alert fires
Cause: Sensor aging; condensation on element; slow drift
Current_Controls: No plausibility check on DHT22 readings; sensor_ok only flags hard failure
Recommended_Action: Add cross-check against leaf_temp from MLX90614 (air_temp and leaf_temp should track within reasonable bounds); alert on sustained implausible delta

Failure_Mode: 4G data cap / SIM credit exhausted
Effect: Site goes completely dark; same effect as 4G link drop; zone_offline alerts fire
Cause: Unmonitored SIM data usage; high OTA firmware upload consuming quota; spike in sensor frequency
Current_Controls: No existing control for SIM credit monitoring
Recommended_Action: Set up SIM data usage alerts with carrier; use fixed-line backup where available; reduce OTA binary size; monitor monthly data usage

Failure_Mode: ESP32 local autonomous watering logic applies wrong thresholds
Effect: Plants over- or under-watered during comms outage; incorrect thresholds baked into firmware
Cause: Hardcoded thresholds in firmware not matching current site conditions; firmware not updated
Current_Controls: Dripper learning adapts over time; OTA update mechanism exists to push corrected firmware; server commands override local logic when online
Recommended_Action: Expose threshold config via MQTT topic so server can push updated thresholds; add threshold validation in firmware

Failure_Mode: Disk full — writes fail silently
Effect: Sensor readings stop being saved; watering events not recorded; alerting may partially fail; data gap in history
Cause: Unbounded growth of sensor_readings table (every 30s per zone); no retention policy
Current_Controls: SQLite WAL mode; Ecto returns errors on failed writes — but no alert is raised to operator
Recommended_Action: Implement data retention policy (e.g. purge readings older than 6 months); add disk-space monitoring with alert; log DB write failures as alerts

Failure_Mode: Relay contacts weld shut (relay stuck closed)
Effect: Valve cannot be de-energised; continuous watering regardless of commands; flooding risk
Cause: Relay contact arcing on inductive solenoid load; undersized relay; lack of flyback diode
Current_Controls: ZoneServer watchdog detects valve open >120s and sends stop command; stop command reaches relay but relay cannot open; zone_offline alert if ESP32 also fails; NC solenoid safe on total power loss
Recommended_Action: Add flyback diode across each solenoid coil; size relay correctly for inductive load; add flow sensor; add moisture ceiling alert; annual relay inspection

Failure_Mode: 4G link drops completely
Effect: Server loses all data from site; ZoneServer detects zone offline after 30 min and alerts; ESP32 continues autonomous watering; no real-time visibility; no remote valve control
Cause: 4G carrier outage; router fault; SIM credit exhausted; antenna issue
Current_Controls: ZoneServer 30-min timeout fires zone_offline alert; ESP32 local fallback mode; NC solenoids safe on power loss
Recommended_Action: Add Nerves Pi at site to buffer data locally and sync on reconnect; dual-SIM or secondary WiFi backup router; SIM credit auto top-up

Failure_Mode: MLX90614 reads incorrect leaf temp (dirty lens / wrong emissivity)
Effect: Leaf temp data inaccurate; VPD skewed; watering decisions degraded; no alert fires
Cause: Dust or water on lens; emissivity not calibrated for specific plant leaf
Current_Controls: No plausibility check; sensor_ok only flags hard I2C failure
Recommended_Action: Add plausibility check: leaf_temp should be within ±15°C of air_temp for typical plants; alert if persistently outside bounds

Failure_Mode: BasicAuth credentials exposed or weak
Effect: Unauthorised access to dashboard; operator commands (water/stop) can be issued by attacker; settings (SMTP credentials) visible
Cause: Weak default credentials not changed before deployment; credentials shared insecurely; HTTP (not HTTPS) in use
Current_Controls: BasicAuth + settings password required to save settings; documented in config as must-change before go-live
Recommended_Action: Enforce HTTPS; rotate credentials; consider IP allowlist; document credential rotation procedure; add settings_password strength check

Failure_Mode: Solenoid valve stuck mechanically closed (no water delivered)
Effect: Plants dry out; critical_dry alert fires at <=10% moisture; dripper learning flags dripper_fault after 3 failed baselines
Cause: Debris blockage; failed solenoid coil; wiring break to solenoid
Current_Controls: Dripper learning detects lack of moisture rise after watering and sets dripper_fault after 3 events; critical_dry alert fires at <=10% moisture; ESP32 local fallback still attempts watering
Recommended_Action: Inspect and flush solenoids on maintenance schedule; dripper_fault alert should trigger immediate email+SMS; consider flow sensor

Failure_Mode: PC crashes or OS locks up (BSOD / hang)
Effect: All monitoring and alerting stops across every site; MQTT broker goes down; no commands can be sent; valves cannot be stopped remotely; no alerts fire
Cause: Windows instability / hardware fault / BSOD; unattended PC
Current_Controls: BEAM supervision restarts Elixir processes after crash; NC solenoids fail-closed on power loss; ESP32 local fallback continues autonomous watering
Recommended_Action: Move to dedicated always-on Linux host or Raspberry Pi; configure OS watchdog; UPS with auto-shutdown; monitoring from external health-check service

Failure_Mode: PC power loss (no UPS)
Effect: Mosquitto + Elixir + SQLite all go offline simultaneously; ESP32s lose MQTT contact and fall back to local mode; no remote alerting; NC solenoids safe-close on power loss
Cause: Mains power failure; no UPS fitted
Current_Controls: NC solenoids fail safe; ESP32 autonomous fallback
Recommended_Action: Fit UPS to central PC; configure Mosquitto and Elixir as auto-start services; test recovery procedure

Failure_Mode: SQLite database file corruption
Effect: Historical sensor data and watering events lost or inaccessible; dashboard may error; alerting log broken
Cause: Unclean shutdown during write; disk full; filesystem error on Windows
Current_Controls: SQLite WAL mode reduces corruption risk; Ecto handles DB errors gracefully; alert log also written to memory
Recommended_Action: Add daily automated SQLite backup to second location (network share or cloud); monitor disk free space; run PRAGMA integrity_check on startup

Failure_Mode: MQTT broker unauthenticated access (no password configured)
Effect: Rogue devices can publish fake sensor data or subscribe to all topics; attacker could trigger watering commands
Cause: Default Mosquitto config allows anonymous access; SECURITY_SETUP.md may not have been followed
Current_Controls: MQTT username/password configured in config.exs and should match Mosquitto password file; SECURITY_SETUP.md referenced in MQTTConnector
Recommended_Action: Enforce Mosquitto authentication; validate that anonymous access is disabled on startup; add MQTT TLS; document and test security setup

Failure_Mode: Capacitive soil moisture sensor reads constant low value (stuck dry)
Effect: Emergency watering triggers repeatedly; water wastage; possible root flooding from excess water; critical_dry alert fires continuously
Cause: Sensor failure returning minimum ADC value; broken wire; corroded connector
Current_Controls: sensor_ok map flags hard failure (no response); mode changes to no_moisture; critical_dry threshold check; ZoneServer sensor_fault alert fires
Recommended_Action: Improve sensor_ok to detect stuck-at-min/max ADC values in addition to complete no-response; add bounds check

Failure_Mode: Mosquitto service crashes or stops
Effect: All ESP32s lose MQTT connection and fall into local autonomous mode; no data received; no remote commands; zone_offline alerts fire after 30 min
Cause: Windows service failure; port conflict; config corruption; resource exhaustion
Current_Controls: ESP32 local fallback continues watering; NC solenoids safe; BEAM isolation means Elixir keeps running but is blind; zone_offline alert after 30 min
Recommended_Action: Configure Mosquitto as auto-restart Windows service; add external health-check ping; consider moving broker to dedicated Pi

Failure_Mode: Mains power loss at nursery site
Effect: ESP32 loses power; all sensors go dark; solenoid valves de-energise (NC = safe closed); zone_offline alert after 30 min; no local watering possible during outage
Cause: Grid power failure; tripped circuit breaker; damaged supply cable
Current_Controls: NC solenoids fail-safe closed; ZoneServer detects offline after 30 min and alerts; ESP32 resumes and reconnects after power restored
Recommended_Action: Add UPS or battery backup for ESP32 and 4G router at each site; alert on power restoration for confirmation; check breaker labels and accessibility

Failure_Mode: Voltage sag / brown-out causing ESP32 resets
Effect: ESP32 resets repeatedly; intermittent sensor data; MQTT reconnects cause gaps; unreliable valve control
Cause: Undersized PSU; long cable runs causing voltage drop; solar/battery supply at end of day
Current_Controls: ESP32 reconnects to MQTT after reset; local fallback resumes; zone may briefly appear offline then recover
Recommended_Action: Use adequately rated PSU (min 2A at 5V for ESP32 + relay board); add capacitor on supply rail; shorten or upsize cable runs

Failure_Mode: ESP32 MQTT connection lost (WiFi drops but ESP32 still running)
Effect: No data reaches server; ZoneServer detects offline after 30 min; ESP32 continues autonomous local watering
Cause: 4G router reboot; WiFi interference; DHCP lease expiry; ESP32 WiFi stack bug
Current_Controls: ESP32 local fallback mode continues autonomous watering; zone_offline alert after 30 min; ESP32 attempts MQTT reconnect continuously
Recommended_Action: Reduce zone_offline threshold for faster alerting; add watchdog on ESP32 WiFi reconnect; consider static IP to avoid DHCP issues

Failure_Mode: Partial power loss (ESP32 or relay supply fails but 4G router stays up)
Effect: ESP32 goes offline; zone appears offline; solenoids de-energise safely; zone_offline alert fires
Cause: Blown fuse on ESP32 supply rail; wiring fault to relay board
Current_Controls: NC solenoids safe; zone_offline alert after 30 min
Recommended_Action: Fit per-zone fuses and indicator LEDs on power rails; add power monitoring GPIO to detect supply rail fault

Failure_Mode: MQTT QoS 0 — command messages lost in transit
Effect: Water or stop command dropped by broker; valve stays open or zone not watered; no delivery acknowledgement
Cause: QoS 0 (fire-and-forget) used for all publishes including valve commands (confirmed in zone_server.ex send_command/3)
Current_Controls: ZoneServer watchdog detects valve stuck open after 120s and re-sends stop command; dripper learning detects missing moisture rise
Recommended_Action: Upgrade valve commands (water/stop) to QoS 1 to ensure at-least-once delivery; keep sensor data at QoS 0

Failure_Mode: Elixir app crashes entirely (top-level supervisor failure)
Effect: All ZoneServer processes die; no watchdog checks; no stuck-valve detection; no sensor-fault detection; no alerts; data not saved to SQLite; dashboard goes blank
Cause: Unhandled exception escaping top-level supervisor; out-of-memory; corrupt DB causing cascade
Current_Controls: BEAM supervision; isolated per-zone ZoneServer processes; crash rarely propagates beyond one zone
Recommended_Action: Add external health-check endpoint (HTTP /health) monitored by uptime service; page on silence

Failure_Mode: OTA update requires 4G link — fails during poor connectivity
Effect: ESP32 stuck mid-flash or fails to receive update; site may stay on old vulnerable firmware
Cause: 4G signal weak or intermittent during OTA window; large binary exceeding reliable transfer window
Current_Controls: Bootloader rollback on crash; ESP32 retries on next boot if version mismatch
Recommended_Action: Serve OTA from Nerves Pi locally (no 4G dependency); schedule OTA during low-traffic period; implement chunked OTA with resume

Failure_Mode: Dashboard shows stale data (LiveView PubSub disconnect)
Effect: Operator sees outdated zone status; may not notice new alert; believes system is fine when it is not
Cause: WebSocket disconnect from long-lived browser session; network hiccup between browser and server
Current_Controls: LiveView reconnects automatically on disconnect; PubSub broadcast resumes
Recommended_Action: Add visible "last updated" timestamp on dashboard; show connection status indicator in LiveView; alert on stale data if no PubSub event in N minutes

Failure_Mode: 4G router reboots (brief outage 30–120s)
Effect: Short data gap; ESP32 MQTT reconnect after router comes back; zone may briefly appear at risk of offline alert if outage crosses 30 min
Cause: Router firmware update auto-reboot; thermal shutdown; power glitch
Current_Controls: ESP32 reconnects automatically on MQTT restore; ZoneServer offline timer resets on first data received; brief gaps are normal
Recommended_Action: Configure 4G router reboot window to off-hours; set zone_timeout_minutes to tolerate brief outages; add router remote management access

Failure_Mode: ZoneServer process for one zone crashes
Effect: That zone loses watchdog; stuck-valve detection and alerting disabled for that zone until restart; valve may stay open beyond 120s before detection resumes
Cause: Unhandled pattern match on unexpected sensor payload; DB error during insert
Current_Controls: ZoneSupervisor auto-restarts crashed process within seconds; other zones unaffected; BEAM isolation
Recommended_Action: Add telemetry counter for ZoneServer crash restarts; alert if a zone process restarts more than N times per hour

Failure_Mode: Corrupt or incompatible firmware delivered via OTA
Effect: ESP32 crashes on boot with new firmware; site goes dark
Cause: Build error in firmware binary; wrong binary served; flash corruption during OTA transfer
Current_Controls: ESP32 bootloader auto-rollback to previous firmware on crash; firmware served from central firmware_controller endpoint; version checked on boot
Recommended_Action: Add firmware checksum/hash verification before flash; stage OTA to one zone before rolling out; NervesHub on Nerves Pi adds device identity verification for OTA

Failure_Mode: Dashboard HTTP server not running (Elixir/Phoenix down)
Effect: Operator cannot view zone status; cannot send manual water/stop commands; cannot change settings; alerts still fire if ZoneServer and Alerting are running
Cause: Phoenix Endpoint crash; port conflict; Elixir app not started
Current_Controls: BEAM supervision restarts Phoenix Endpoint; ZoneServer and alerting continue independently of dashboard
Recommended_Action: Add external uptime monitor on dashboard URL; display last-seen timestamp on all zones to indicate data freshness

Failure_Mode: ESP32 firmware crash / watchdog reset
Effect: Zone loses data for ~30s during reboot; MQTT reconnect; local fallback pauses briefly; valve closes safely on reset (NC solenoid)
Cause: Stack overflow; unhandled exception in firmware; hardware WDT
Current_Controls: NC solenoids safe on power/reset; ESP32 hardware WDT resets and resumes; MQTT reconnect re-establishes comms; OTA bootloader rollback if crash on new firmware
Recommended_Action: Monitor frequency of unexpected resets via MQTT session reconnect events; log reset reason; add reset counter to telemetry

Failure_Mode: DHT22 total failure (no response)
Effect: VPD-based watering decisions lost; ZoneServer switches to no_vpd mode and uses fallback schedule; sensor_fault alert fires
Cause: Sensor failure; wiring break; GPIO fault on ESP32
Current_Controls: sensor_ok map detects failure immediately; mode changes to no_vpd; sensor_fault alert (email); watering continues on fallback schedule
Recommended_Action: Stock spare DHT22s on site; add to maintenance spares kit

Failure_Mode: MLX90614 failure (I2C error or no response)
Effect: Leaf temperature unavailable; VPD calculation may be impacted; sensor_fault alert fires
Cause: I2C bus fault; sensor hardware failure; emissivity mismatch; dirty lens
Current_Controls: sensor_ok map detects I2C failure; sensor_fault alert fires; mode degrades gracefully
Recommended_Action: Clean lens periodically; stock spare sensor; log failure to alert

Failure_Mode: BH1750 failure (I2C error or no response)
Effect: Lux reading unavailable; VPD-context for watering decisions degraded; sensor_fault alert fires; historical lux data gap
Cause: I2C bus fault; sensor hardware failure; wiring issue
Current_Controls: sensor_ok map detects I2C failure; sensor_fault alert fires; lux used as context not primary trigger — limited operational impact
Recommended_Action: Stock spare BH1750; monitor I2C bus health; low priority
